title: Transfer ownership when the original owner must exit
prompt: Write `test/my_app/ownership_transfer_test.exs` that: (1) the test process checks out the sandbox, (2) spawns a supervised child worker, (3) before the test returns, transfers ownership of the sandbox connection to the child via `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.checkin/1` followed by the child calling `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.checkout/2`, (4) asserts the child can continue querying. This demonstrates cross-process ownership handoff.
tier_rationale: Obscure pattern — checkin + checkout as transfer mechanism.
research_citation: "The process calling `checkout/2` will own the connection until it calls `checkin/2` or until it crashes" — Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox docs
